category_sources: Official RTK docs describe RTK as a CLI proxy between AI assistants and development tools.
source_facts.description says it is a CLI proxy to minimize LLM token consumption.
display_name_sources: Official docs title uses RTK and expands it as Rust Token Killer.
docs_sources: Official RTK documentation page at source_facts.homepage /docs path.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/rtk-ai/rtk; per instruction repo is returned as null when source_facts.repo is present.
tags_sources: Official RTK docs describe AI assistant command-output filtering and token savings.
source_facts.description identifies CLI proxy and LLM token minimization.
